history.title: Unify Capability Enum
history.notes: All 6 tasks were already implemented by prior work. Removed stale WasmCapability comment. Pre-existing compilation error in life-engine-types blocks cargo check but is unrelated to this WP.

history.title: Add Missing HTTP Method Variants to Plugin SDK
history.notes: Added Propfind, Report, Mkcalendar, Mkcol to HttpMethod enum in plugin-sdk and workflow-engine. Registered PROPFIND/REPORT routes in api-caldav and api-carddav. Pre-existing compilation error in life-engine-types blocks full cargo check.
